title: Nebius Breaks Ground On US AI Factory Linking Growth And Community Benefits
description:
Nebius Group (NasdaqGS:NBIS) has started construction on a gigawatt-scale AI factory campus in Independence, Missouri.
The project is the company’s first large digital infrastructure build in the US and includes local education, workforce, and community benefit programs.
The new campus is planned with sustainability measures and is positioned as Nebius Group’s flagship US AI facility.

Nebius Group, trading at $214.77, has drawn strong market attention, with the stock up 138.8% year to date...
